$comment: Shared TS<->Python parity corpus for the role-aware lane checker. Each case is run through BOTH the TS scanLaneViolations (via node) and the Python scan_lane_violations; the sorted (token, lane, severity, index) tuples MUST be identical. Mirrors the M7 parity discipline (Report-Engine tests/test_m7_lint.py ParityCorpus). Add a case here and BOTH languages must agree.
